name: Killing of Neda Agha-Soltan
description: Neda Agha-Soltan, a 26-year-old bystander, was fatally shot during the Green Movement protests in Tehran. Video of her death spread globally, making her the iconic symbol of the movement.
editorial_notes: Shot in Amirabad neighbourhood, Tehran. Shooter believed to be Basij militia member. No charges ever filed.
